logic_order: identify patient population: women_menopause_BHRT or men_hormone_optimization
collect dominant wellness goal and symptom phenotype
run BHRT/MHT or men’s HRT safety gates first
run peptide universal safety gates and family-specific gates
select only one primary peptide family unless provider overrides
match IV/IM support only after safety clearance
output provider-review options with evidence language and do-not-claim language
never claim hormone-peptide synergy without direct evidence
